data.title: Resideo’s ADI hits an its an ecommerce milestone in Q1
data.description: Digital adoption is helping ADI scale efficiently while improving profitability, fueled in part by higher-margin online sales and a broader push into exclusive brand offerings.

data.title: Albertsons expands B2B ecommerce platform
data.description: While Albertsons has historically focused on consumer grocery delivery, its strategic turn toward serving business buyers signals broader ambitions in the B2B fulfillment space

data.title: Visa, Mastercard offer support for AI agents
data.description: The separate offerings support the rise of "agentic commerce," where AI agents search for products, make recommendations and complete purchases on behalf of users.

data.title: 1-800-Flowers.com puts Mother's Day flowers on Uber Eats
data.description: The Mother's Day announcement expands on existing last-mile flowers delivery that Uber Direct has done for 1-800-Flowers.com.

data.title: DHL Supply Chain acquires IDS Fulfillment to expand U.S. ecommerce
data.description: The deal brings more than 1.3 million square feet of multi-client warehouse and distribution space under DHL's umbrella.
